channel.title: setup on László Szurok
channel.description: Recent content in setup on László Szurok

item.title: Setting up my most used programs
item.description: The Z program The z program will make your life easier on the command line. Installation: ❯ git clone https://github.com/rupa/z ~/z ❯ mkdir ~/.cache/z ❯ echo ". ~/z/z.sh" >> ~/.zshrc ❯ exec $SHELL Use it like this: ❯ cd grandparent-folder/parent-folder/child-folder ❯ cd different/path/to/another/folder ❯ z child-folder The last command will take you back directly inside the directory called child-folder. The z program automatically updates itself as you use it, so it will always know the path of the folders you visited.
